CustomField.description: The date the program requested the binder. An insurance binder is a document showing the insurance company's commitment to insure the home; a temporary issuance of proof of insurance that will cover or "bind" coverage until the formal policy is issued.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date the program requested the binder. An insurance binder is a document showing the insurance company's commitment to insure the home; a temporary issuance of proof of insurance that will cover or "bind" coverage until the formal policy is issued.
CustomField.label: Insurance Binder Requested
